description_long: This is a modern video game controller, most closely resembling an Xbox controller, with a sleek, ergonomic design. The body is primarily a deep, glossy purple, accented by beige analog sticks, D-pad, and shoulder buttons. The face features four colored action buttons labeled Y (yellow), X (blue), B (red), and A (green), as well as a central Xbox logo button. The rear side shows contoured grips and additional beige triggers, designed for comfortable handheld use. The controller is constructed from hard plastic with a smooth, slightly reflective finish, and is likely powered by internal batteries or replaceable cells. This object is typically used for gaming and interactive entertainment in home or urban recreational environments.
description: A sleek, purple and beige Xbox-style video game controller with colored action buttons and ergonomic grips. The surface is smooth and glossy, with prominent analog sticks and triggers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main controls: analog sticks, D-pad, colored action buttons, and the Xbox logo button.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the raised analog sticks, shoulder buttons, and the ergonomic curve of the grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the contoured beige grips and the back panel, with visible triggers.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the symmetry of the controls and the smooth, continuous body shape.
